ideals: I addressed challenges with strength, leadership, or force
I expressed my heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
I didn't back down when faced with a challenge
system.secondWind: Regain all effort when you take injury or harm while protecting someone else.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: When an ally close to you suffers strain, you can take the strain for them. You can spend 1 Effort when you take any strain to reduce it by 1, to a minimum of 1.

powers.name: True Grit
powers.description: When you break, you remain in control of your character for the rest of the scene.

powers.name: Iron Jaw
powers.description: You can't suffer critical strain (take 4 strain instead).

powers.name: Volcanic
powers.description: 2/session - When someone or something harms an ally in your presence, get +1d or increased effect (choose) on all actions against them for the rest of the scene.

powers.name: Hammersoul
powers.description: Your Smash actions have increased effect when you're exhausted.

powers.name: Overpower
powers.description: You can push by taking 2 strain instead of spending effort for Endure and Smash actions.

powers.name: The Tower
powers.description: While you're at maximum strain, characters can aid you without spending effort. If you break, all characters that witness it recover 1 effort.

powers.name: Force of Will
powers.description: 1/session - Choose to automatically treat your next Command action roll as a 6. The GM can decide a character is too strong willed, forcing you to roll normally, but regain 2 effort after. Always works on foes from a lower chapter.

powers.name: Half Light
powers.description: When you gather information about violence or possible threats, you can use Endure, Smash, or Command.

powers.name: The Wall
powers.description: 1/session - This scene only, reduce all strain suffered by you or an ally of your choice by 1, to a minimum of 1.

powers.name: Make Total Destroy
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the effect of your next Smash action to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of The Storm Lord
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Adventurer's Kit
items: Lantern, pack, bedroll, rope, flint and tinder, journal, rations, cooking pot, knife, canvas tent

gearKits.name: Soldier's Kit
items: Extra rations, whetstone, oil, two pairs of good boots, extra large pack, badge of rank, protection ward

gearKits.name: Mercenary's Kit
items: Fortifying snack, iron flask, bounty ledger, backup weapon, foldable hand cart, heavy object for hitting someone with

gearKits.name: Brawler's Kit
items: Healing ointment, copious bandages, splint, thick gauntlets or gloves, foldable stretcher, good luck charm
